---
title: "Weekly Progress"
author: "{{author}}"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    theme: simple
---

## This Week

<!-- 要点列表 -->

<!-- 插入图表：-->
<!-- ![实验结果](results/example.png){width=70%} -->

## Blockers

<!-- 卡点，是否需要帮助 -->

## Questions

<!-- 需要导师确认的事项 -->

## Next Steps

<!-- 下周计划 -->
